description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.5 Docker image and defines the environment variables TERM=linux and TERMINFO=/etc/terminfo. Add a single job named unittest that runs in the default test stage and executes the following shell commands in order: apt-get update -qy; apt-get install -y python-dev python-pip unzip; pip install --upgrade pip; pip install -r requirements.txt; and finally bash ./run_test.sh. The pipeline has no explicit stages, caches, artifacts, or rules, relying on the default behavior.
